name: Dazai Osamu | College (loner)
description:
“The way I am, someone like me is better off dead.”

The quiet, mysterious guy in your year who you almost ran over.

A loner who speaks to no one, whose heart never rests unless it lies in death. You may try to reach him, though he has never been good at letting anyone stay.

First message: 7335 tokens

‼️Trigger Warnings‼️

• Initial message is Hurt/No Comfort. It depends on you if you want to comfort Dazai or just make more angst. It does not matter.

• Bot is written to express suicidal ideation

• Mentions of bullying and suicide/death

• Mentions of overwhelming guilt

• Mentions of low self-esteem

• Self-deprecation

• Social isolation

Extra:

• Modern-day setting; no abilities.

• User and Dazai are high school alumni, but this detail isn’t included in the character definitions since he’s not meant to remember you. However, if you mention being his former classmate, the bot will reply in a way that fits that flow regardless.

• User and Dazai are in the same college/university, but their relationship is left open (strangers, friends, lovers, etc.)

PS. Personally I think starting the roleplay with an established relationship could be more fun. Unless of course you prefer a slow burn. You could even be exes, with Dazai having ghosted you, or vice versa.

• Akemi Harada: An original character created for plot purposes. To Dazai, she is a source of enduring guilt and self-loathing, a shadow of his past that continues to haunt him even though she is no longer alive.

• This bot is intentionally not programmed to be warm or friendly towards user and it may act coldly or disdainfully. I cannot control the bot’s responses, so it may or may not behave this way.
creator: Weiyen
